# Workspace instructions for PIMp my access

Use this file as always-on guidance for agent sessions in this workspace.

## Context source
Read PROJECT_CONTEXT.md first for project background, architecture, and workflow intent.

## Product naming
Always use this exact product name in responses and docs: PIMp my access.

## User approval rules
- Never delete files or folders without explicit user approval.
- Do not edit any file until explicit user approval is given.

## Response style preferences
- Keep responses concise and readable by default.
- Prefer flat bullet lists when listing steps.

## Repository hygiene intent
When preparing for public sharing, prioritize runtime and build-critical files and exclude internal-only docs, notes, and local report folders unless the user asks otherwise.
